heading: Today
text: A spotty shower, otherwise clouds and some breaks of sun.
temperature: Mainly mid 30s to mid 40s north, 50s and 60s south falling

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Some breaks far north.  A chance of rain or isolated sleet in southern counties.
temperature: Upper 20s to low 30s north, in the 30s south

heading: Thursday
text: A little rain or sleet early south, late north. Mostly cloudy.
